cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what the father did when he was laid off. The options are A through D. Looking at the passage, the first thing the son notices is that his dad was home early. When the son asks why, the dad quietly says he was laid off. The son initially thinks it's a joke but then realizes it's true. The dad is described as someone who took pride in his career, so losing his job affected him. The passage mentions that the dad was searching for jobs all day, was down, and his self-esteem was affected, even though he tried to be optimistic. Option A says he was angry with his boss, but the text doesn't mention anger. Option B says he didn't care, but the opposite is true—he was affected. Option C says he couldn't accept the fact easily.
